zh.Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利
zh.Saint Mary, Aylesbury, Buckingham, Engla: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利
zh.Saint Mary, Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire,: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Hoare於1570年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利時，他的父親William Hoare26歲，母親Ursely Edmonds26歲。他於1592年2月12日與Julyan Tripplett在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1590年在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利被列為cobbler。他去世於1627年1月31日之後在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Hoare于1570年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利时，他的父亲William Hoare26岁，母亲Ursely Edmonds26岁。他于1592年2月12日与Julyan Tripplett在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1590年在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利被列为cobbler。他去世于1627年1月31日之后在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Hoare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hoar
meanings: nickname from Middle English hor(e) ‘gray- or white-haired’ (Old English hār). This name has been established in Ireland since the late 13th century and was Gaelicized as de Hóir and de Hóra.
habitational name from Ore (Sussex), or else a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) bank’, from Middle English or(e) ‘brink, edge’ (Old English ōra).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Hoare was born in 1570, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, William Hoare, was 26 and his mother, Ursely Edmonds, was 26. He married Julyan Tripplett on 12 February 1592, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. In 1590, his occupation is listed as cobbler in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England. He died after 31 January 1627, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Hoare est né en 1570, à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William Hoare, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ursely Edmonds, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Julyan Tripplett le 12 février 1592, à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. En 1590, sa profession de son indiquée est cobbler à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé après 31 janvier 1627, à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Hoare 1570 in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Hoare 26 und seine Mutter Ursely Edmonds 26. Er hat am 12. Februar 1592 in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Julyan Tripplett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1590 ist sein Beruf als cobbler in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb nach 31. Januar 1627 in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Hoare è nato il nel 1570 nel Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, William Hoare, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Ursely Edmonds, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Julyan Tripplett il 12 febbraio 1592, nel Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1590, la sua occupazione è indicata come cobbler nel Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England. Morì dopo il 31 gennaio 1627, nel Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Hoareが1570年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーで生まれた時，父William Hoareは26歳，母Ursely Edmondsは26歳であった。1592年2月12日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーでJulyan Tripplettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1590年，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーでの職業はcobblerと記録されている。彼は1627年1月31日以後にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーで死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Hoare(이)가 1570년 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Hoare(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Ursely Edmonds(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1592년 2월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 Julyan Tripplett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1590년, 그의 직업은 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 cobbler이었다. 그는 1627년 1월 31일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Hoare nasceu em 1570, em Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Hoare, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Ursely Edmonds, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Julyan Tripplett em 12 de fevereiro de 1592, em Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1590, sua profissão aparece como cobbler em Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu após 31 de janeiro de 1627, em Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Hoare родился в 1570 г. в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Hoare было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ursely Edmonds, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Julyan Tripplett 12 февраля 1592 г. в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1590 году он работал по профессии cobbler в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия. Он умер после 31 январь 1627 г. в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Hoare nació en 1570, en Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Hoare, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Ursely Edmonds, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Julyan Tripplett el 12 de febrero de 1592, en Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1590, su ocupación registrada era cobbler en Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Murió después de 31 de enero de 1627, en Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
